message:
test(load): add comprehensive unit tests for load.rs

Add 24 new unit tests covering:
- LoadArgs parsing: minimal args, level flags, pack options, deps modes
- DisclosurePlan determination: default behavior, level overrides, pack budgets
- Edge cases: invalid levels, numeric levels, flag precedence
- Struct validation: LoadResult, CliPackMode, DepsMode

Increases test coverage for the load command module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
